name: Potato-Bacon Cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Spray 4 6-ounce custard cups with nonstick cooking spray. Place the cups on a baking sheet.
2. In a medium bowl, combine all the ingredients. Divide evenly among the prepared cups. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes, until the tops are golden brown.
